rationale: Both navigation.spec.ts (TC-006/007 + TC-002 brand fix) and layout.e2e.ts migrated to live fixture harness via runtime nodeInfo/projects lookup filtered to ddx-e2e-* workspaces. Demo config/spec untouched. Result reports task_succeeded with exit 0.

findings.summary: TC-002 and layout brand assertion narrowed from getByText('DDx') to getByRole('link', {name:'DDx'}) — minor scope creep beyond stated TC-006/TC-007 targets but justified to disambiguate svelte-announcer and within the spec file.
Fixture lookup filters /api/projects by ddx-e2e-* path/name prefix, which correctly avoids picking up developer-local persisted projects per the rollback/cleanup guidance.
